statement: Instruction files for domain-specific technology must address design philosophy and architecture patterns to guide AI output quality — files consisting only of syntax rules duplicate static analysis tools and provide minimal judgment guidance.

evidenceRefs.title: r/cpp Design Patterns thread (83 upvotes) — practitioners report patterns should emerge from repeated code, not be imposed prescriptively
C++ Core Guidelines — P: Philosophy section covers judgment over mechanical rule-following

publicSummary: Domain-specific instruction files should cover design philosophy and architecture, not just syntax rules that static analysis tools already enforce.
